title: clinopodium spinosum
intro: Clinopodium spinosum, also known as wild marjoram or prickly calamint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium spinosum include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium spinosum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
